hooks.command: loops=$(ps -axo pid,stat,command 2>/dev/null | rg 'run-poetics-adaptation-loop|run-poetics-production-batch|generate-pedagogical-dramas' | rg -v ' rg ' || true); if [ -n "$loops" ]; then echo "WARNING: poetics loops currently running (do not start another):"; echo "$loops"; else echo "poetics: no loops running"; fi; latest=$(ls -t exports/*adaptation-recognition-loop*loop-status.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$latest" ]; then echo "latest loop status: $latest"; sed -n '1,12p' "$latest"; fi; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); b=${f##*/}; case "$b" in .env|.env.local|.env.*.local|.env.production|.env.development) echo "Blocked: $b holds live API keys - edit it manually, not via Claude." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; exit 0

DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.js) cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; out=$(./node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; ./node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "Hook ran eslint --fix + prettier on $f, but ESLint errors remain (npm run lint / CI will fail) — fix these now:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac; exit 0

DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *paper-full-2.0.md|*paper-short-2.0.md) cd "$DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; echo "Paper edited; running paper:provable-discourse (full, DB-backed, warn-only, ~30s) ..." >&2; out=$(npm run --silent paper:provable-discourse 2>&1); sum=$(echo "$out" | grep -E '^Summary:' | head -1); echo "${sum:-paper:provable-discourse produced no summary (DB missing?)}" >&2; fails=$(echo "$sum" | sed -n 's/.*, *\([0-9][0-9]*\) fail.*/\1/p'); if [ "${fails:-0}" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: paper:provable-discourse reported $fails FAIL(s) -- a tracked claim number may have drifted from the snapshot. Run 'npm run paper:provable-discourse' for detail." >&2; echo "$out" | tail -40 >&2; fi ;; esac; exit 0
